mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_info (order_id, user_id, total_amount, status, address, contact_name, contact_phone, coupon_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{address}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{couponId}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO order_item (item_id, order_id, product_id, product_type, product_name, product_image, current_price, quantity, total_price, create_time, update_time) VALUES (UUID(), #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productType},#{productName}, #{productImage}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{price} * #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0) FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN order_info o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE DATE(o.create_time) = CURDATE() AND o.status != 4
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) FROM order_info WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND status != 4

SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) as count FROM order_info WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND status != 4 GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT oi.product_id FROM order_info o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id and oi.product_type = 'GROUP_BUY' WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY oi.product_id
SELECT oi.* FROM order_info o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS orderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS userCount, COALESCE(AVG(o.total_amount), 0) AS avgOrderPrice FROM order_info o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN product_info p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = #{category} AND o.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND o.status IN (1,2,3)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT o.user_id FROM order_info o INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN product_info p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = #{category} AND o.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND o.status IN (1,2,3) GROUP BY o.user_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) >= 2 ) t
